raw_consumer_statement:
The property was advertised and rented as a fully functional, habitable accommodation. During my stay, the heating system failed completely while outdoor temperatures dropped to XXXX conditions that are objectively life-threatening, particularly for young children. I immediately notified the host of this emergency, and the communication is documented in chat screenshots attached to this appeal. 
While the host did dispatch an HVAC technician, upon arrival the technician informed me that his company does not service that specific type of heating unit. The technician then called the host directly in my presence to communicate that he was unable to perform the repair. Despite being informed of this, the host took no further action : no alternative heating was provided, no comparable accommodations were arranged, and no refund was offered. 
As a result, my family including young children was forced to vacate the property before the end of the rental period due to the unsafe conditions. I personally remained at the property as long as possible attempting to await a resolution, as I had business obligations nearby, but no assistance ever came.
